subject: current-affairs
description: Iran Israel War 2025 MCQs for PPSC, FPSC, NTS, CSS & PMS.

mcqs.q: The Iran–Israel War started on:
mcqs.explanation: Israel launched Operation Rising Lion on 13 June 2025, beginning the Iran–Israel War.

mcqs.q: The Iran–Israel War ended on:
mcqs.explanation: A US-brokered ceasefire between Iran and Israel took effect on 24 June 2025.

mcqs.q: The Iran–Israel War is also known as the:
mcqs.explanation: The 12-day duration earned the conflict the name 'Twelve-Day War' in international media.

mcqs.q: The war began with Israeli surprise attacks that:
options: Hit key military and nuclear facilities in Iran
Assassinated prominent military leaders, nuclear scientists and politicians
mcqs.explanation: Operation Rising Lion struck nuclear facilities, killed senior IRGC commanders and nuclear scientists, and degraded Iranian air defences.

mcqs.q: Iran retaliated with over 550 ballistic missiles and over 1,000 suicide drones, hitting civilian centres, one hospital and at least _____ military, energy and government sites.
mcqs.explanation: Iranian retaliation reportedly hit at least 12 military, energy and government sites in Israel.

mcqs.q: The United States bombed three Iranian nuclear sites on:
mcqs.explanation: The US conducted Operation Midnight Hammer on 22 June 2025, striking Fordow, Natanz and Isfahan.

mcqs.q: Iran retaliated against the US by firing missiles at a US base on 23 June 2025 in:
mcqs.explanation: Iran fired missiles at the US Al-Udeid Air Base in Qatar on 23 June 2025.

mcqs.q: In _____, six countries lifted sanctions on Iran under the Joint Comprehensive Plan of Action (JCPOA), which froze its nuclear program.
mcqs.explanation: The JCPOA was signed in Vienna in July 2015 and entered implementation in January 2016.

mcqs.q: Netanyahu announced the launch of Operation _____ targeting Iran's main enrichment facility at Natanz, its nuclear scientists and parts of its ballistic missile program.
mcqs.explanation: Israel's military operation against Iran in June 2025 was codenamed 'Operation Rising Lion'.

mcqs.q: The United States large-scale strikes on Iran's nuclear sites at Fordow, Natanz and Isfahan were codenamed:
mcqs.explanation: The US strikes on Iranian nuclear sites on 22 June 2025 were codenamed 'Operation Midnight Hammer'.

mcqs.q: Total duration of the Iran–Israel War 2025 was:
mcqs.explanation: The Iran–Israel War lasted 12 days from 13 June to 24 June 2025 — hence the 'Twelve-Day War'.

mcqs.q: The Israeli Prime Minister who announced Operation Rising Lion was:
mcqs.explanation: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu announced Operation Rising Lion on 13 June 2025.

mcqs.q: The US President who ordered Operation Midnight Hammer was:
mcqs.explanation: US President Donald Trump ordered Operation Midnight Hammer on 22 June 2025.

mcqs.q: Iran's Supreme Leader during the 2025 war was:
mcqs.explanation: Ayatollah Ali Khamenei has been the Supreme Leader of the Islamic Republic of Iran since 1989.

mcqs.q: Iran's President during the 2025 war was:
mcqs.explanation: Masoud Pezeshkian, elected in July 2024, was the President of Iran during the June 2025 war.

mcqs.q: The US military base in Qatar struck by Iranian missiles on 23 June 2025 is named:
mcqs.explanation: Iran's missiles targeted the US Al-Udeid Air Base in Qatar — the largest US military base in the Middle East.

mcqs.q: Iran's principal underground uranium enrichment facility — struck by US bunker-busters on 22 June 2025 — is located at:
mcqs.explanation: Fordow is Iran's deeply buried, hardened uranium enrichment facility — the primary target of US bunker-buster strikes.

mcqs.q: Iran's main enrichment facility hit during Operation Rising Lion (13 June 2025) is located at:
mcqs.explanation: Natanz hosts Iran's main commercial-scale uranium enrichment facility and was struck during Operation Rising Lion.

mcqs.q: The third Iranian nuclear site struck during Operation Midnight Hammer is at:
mcqs.explanation: Isfahan houses Iran's nuclear technology centre and uranium-conversion facility — the third site hit on 22 June 2025.

mcqs.q: The JCPOA — the 2015 nuclear deal with Iran — was signed in:
mcqs.explanation: The JCPOA was signed in Vienna on 14 July 2015.

mcqs.q: The JCPOA was signed between Iran and the P5+1, which comprises:
options: US, UK, France, China, Russia, Germany
mcqs.explanation: The P5+1 are the five permanent UN Security Council members (US, UK, France, China, Russia) plus Germany.

mcqs.q: The Trump administration unilaterally withdrew the United States from the JCPOA in:
mcqs.explanation: President Trump announced US withdrawal from the JCPOA in May 2018.

mcqs.q: Iran's military operation against Israel and the US during the 2025 war was codenamed:
mcqs.explanation: Iran codenamed its retaliation 'Operation True Promise 3' (the third in the True Promise series after attacks on Israel in April and October 2024).

mcqs.q: The US bombers used in Operation Midnight Hammer were:
mcqs.explanation: The 22 June 2025 strikes used B-2 Spirit stealth bombers — the only US aircraft capable of dropping the GBU-57 bunker-buster needed against Fordow.

mcqs.q: The Iran–Israel War 2025 ceasefire was brokered primarily by:
mcqs.explanation: The 24 June 2025 ceasefire was brokered primarily by the United States under President Donald Trump's pressure on both sides.
